# Benchmark results

<!-- Generated by `bun run bench` — do not edit by hand. -->

Raw single-threaded Draco decode time: every Draco primitive of each file is decoded
sequentially, and the table reports the median of 10 such runs (after 3 warmup runs).
The corpus is the production bundle GLBs from `example/public/models` plus the sample models
shipped in [mrdoob/draco.js](https://github.com/mrdoob/draco.js) (`samples/`, used straight
from the installed dependency). The last two columns say how minidraco compares to each other
decoder: 🟢 minidraco is faster, 🔴 minidraco is slower, ⚪ within 5% (run noise).

- Date: 2026-07-05
- Runtime: bun 1.3.14 (JavaScriptCore)
- CPU: Apple M3

| file                              | prims |   faces | minidraco |  draco.js | draco3d (wasm) | minidraco vs draco.js | minidraco vs wasm |
| --------------------------------- | ----: | ------: | --------: | --------: | -------------: | --------------------- | ----------------- |
| `canine-bundle.glb`               |     1 |     532 |   0.70 ms |   0.86 ms |        0.75 ms | 🟢 1.23x faster       | 🟢 1.07x faster   |
| `player-bundle.glb`               |     7 |   2,544 |   2.07 ms |   2.24 ms |        1.36 ms | 🟢 1.08x faster       | 🔴 1.53x slower   |
| `static-bundle.glb`               |   488 | 220,879 |  48.22 ms |  51.45 ms |       49.99 ms | 🟢 1.07x faster       | ⚪ even           |
| `IridescentDishWithOlives.glb`    |     4 |  24,448 |   3.86 ms |   3.76 ms |        4.46 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.16x faster   |
| `LittlestTokyo.glb`               |    71 | 141,802 |  70.93 ms |  76.14 ms |       76.46 ms | 🟢 1.07x faster       | 🟢 1.08x faster   |
| `ShaderBall2.glb`                 |     3 |  13,388 |   4.15 ms |   4.66 ms |        4.96 ms | 🟢 1.12x faster       | 🟢 1.19x faster   |
| `bath_day.glb`                    |    22 |  32,158 |   5.48 ms |   5.99 ms |        5.56 ms | 🟢 1.09x faster       | ⚪ even           |
| `duck.glb`                        |     1 |   4,212 |   0.78 ms |   0.87 ms |        1.11 ms | 🟢 1.11x faster       | 🟢 1.42x faster   |
| `ferrari.glb`                     |    51 | 358,788 |  61.59 ms |  62.16 ms |       76.20 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.24x faster   |
| `forest_house.glb`                |    12 |  10,956 |   2.59 ms |   2.85 ms |        2.74 ms | 🟢 1.10x faster       | 🟢 1.06x faster   |
| `gears.glb`                       |     3 |  21,696 |   2.95 ms |   3.05 ms |        3.44 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.17x faster   |
| `kira.glb`                        |    43 |  51,601 |   9.32 ms |   9.25 ms |       11.16 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.20x faster   |
| `minimalistic_modern_bedroom.glb` |     4 |  10,457 |   2.69 ms |   2.72 ms |        2.99 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.11x faster   |
| `nemetona.glb`                    |     1 | 320,352 | 128.36 ms | 137.70 ms |      140.29 ms | 🟢 1.07x faster       | 🟢 1.09x faster   |
| `pool.glb`                        |     2 |  22,280 |   4.85 ms |   5.47 ms |        3.98 ms | 🟢 1.13x faster       | 🔴 1.22x slower   |
| `rolex.glb`                       |    24 | 120,336 |  37.32 ms |  37.11 ms |       41.25 ms | ⚪ even               | 🟢 1.11x faster   |
| `venice_mask.glb`                 |     5 | 295,600 |  74.07 ms |  78.97 ms |       80.19 ms | 🟢 1.07x faster       | 🟢 1.08x faster   |
| `bunny.drc`                       |     1 |  69,451 |   7.93 ms |   8.43 ms |        4.11 ms | 🟢 1.06x faster       | 🔴 1.93x slower   |
| `car.drc`                         |     1 |   1,744 |   0.07 ms |   2.85 ms |        0.13 ms | 🟢 38.07x faster      | 🟢 1.71x faster   |
| `duck.drc`                        |     1 |   4,212 |   1.04 ms |   1.07 ms |        1.08 ms | ⚪ even               | ⚪ even           |

Medians of independent runs still carry roughly ±10% JIT/thermal noise — treat this as the
cross-decoder picture, not a micro-optimization ranking. V8 (browsers) ranks the decoders
differently than JSC; see the in-browser benchmark at `/bench` in the example app.
